name: Pit
items_start: Valve on a large warm pipe
hints: You're in the pit. There's a valve on a warm pipe and a locked door.
The valve needs a handle to turn it. The handle is in the observation chamber.
Bring the valve handle (HAND from room 17) and FIX VALV or TURN VALV to connect and turn it.
Turning the valve drains the water tank and activates the steam calliope. The locked door needs the rusty key.
notes: The pit has a valve on a warm pipe (needs handle from room 17) and a locked door (needs rusty key from room 5). Turning the valve drains the water tank.
